phase_3_blinding.identifying_signals: Candidate A is exactly identical to the final Diff C, clearly making it the human original. Candidate B is an LLM attempt: it successfully solved the DTO issue more elegantly than the human (avoiding O(N) mapping) but failed to include the HTTP client caching (`api.NewCachedHTTPClient`), revealing it as an AI generation that missed a cross-cutting subsystem detail.
